name: Sour-Cherry Soup, Hungarian Style
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh sour cherries, pitted (or hulled strawberries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the flour with the sour cream, salt, and confectioner's sugar until smooth.
2. Meanwhile, cook the sour cherries in 1 1/2 quarts of water with granulated sugar until done.
3. Remove 2 ladlefuls of liquid from the cherry pot and add to the flour mixture; stir for a few minutes.
4. Pour the mixture back into the soup and simmer for 5 minutes. Cover the soup and let it cool that way; this prevents skin from forming. Adjust salt.
Makes: 6-8 servings
